display_name: NFC compensation share of gross value added
notes: S20C authorizes NFC_COMP / NFC_GVA as the preferred unadjusted wage-share baseline; S29A constructed that same direct ratio.

display_name: NFC compensation share of net value added
notes: S29A constructed direct compensation-share ratios; S30B preserves these as wage-share robustness variants below the NFC GVA baseline.

display_name: NFC net operating surplus share of gross value added
notes: S29A constructed net-operating-surplus shares; S20B/S20C keep profit-related shares as alternative or reconciliation evidence, not the preferred wage-share baseline.

notes: S29A constructed net-operating-surplus shares; S20B/S20C keep profit-related shares as alternative or reconciliation evidence, not the preferred wage-share baseline.
